title: Heavenly Trident
description: CEM pack which makes your trident look cooler! Heavenly edition.
body:
Heavenly Trident CEM changes the look of your trident in-game.

I made this pack based on the Heavenly Partisan from my Fantasy 3D Weapons resource pack. To use this resource pack you need OptiFine.

Enjoy!



Join my discord server for info, updates, behind the scenes, and more!

https://discord.gg/9YuWUr8guC
